post_game_fields.reason: Rating change resulting from match outcome. Using this to predict the match it encodes would be temporal leakage (Invariant #3).
Rating change resulting from match outcome. Semantically identical to matches_raw.ratingDiff. Using this to predict the match it encodes would be temporal leakage (Invariant #3).
Match end timestamp. Known only after match completes.

classification_notes.pre_game: Known before match starts. Usable as prediction features without temporal leakage.
classification_notes.post_game: Known only after match ends. Using as feature is temporal leakage (Invariant #3).
classification_notes.ambiguous_pre_or_post: Temporal status unknown; requires Phase 02 investigation before use.
classification_notes.context: Player-level metadata with unclear temporal availability; not match settings and not match outcomes.
